message:
fix(core): resolve mux_pool.rs lifetime errors for _with_cx methods (ft-1memj.2)

Add `move` keyword to closures in MuxPool's _with_cx methods and clone
Cx into owned values for the closures. This fixes 6 "lifetime may not
live long enough" errors caused by closures capturing cx by reference
across the HRTB `for<'a>` boundary in execute_with_recovery_with_cx.

Also add .gitignore to vendored harfbuzz to exclude 86MB of test data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Only track src/ (needed for build) — exclude test data, docs, CI
+/.ci/
+/.circleci/
+/.github/
+/docs/
+/perf/
+/subprojects/
+/test/
+/util/
